name: Selena FM S.A.
summary: Selena FM S.A., through its subsidiaries, produces, distributes, and sells construction chemicals, building materials for doors and windows, and general building accessories to professional contractors and individual users. Its products include polyurethane foams, adhesives, sealants, insulation systems, flooring systems, interior wall systems, ceramic tile systems, construction mortars, waterproofing materials, passive fire protection solutions, and other products primarily under the Tytan, Artelit, Quilosa, Cool-R, and Matizol brand names. The company's products are used for various applications, such as windows and doors, walls and ceilings, kitchens and bathrooms, installations, floors, thermal insulation, facades, claddings, roofs, foundations, and terraces and balconies. It also provides various solutions for the woodworking, upholstery, window and door manufacturing, assembly, and packaging industries. The company operates in European Union, Eastern Europe, Asia, North America, and South America. Selena FM S.A. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Wroclaw, Poland.
